problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Forward. Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient directly addresses this.
